creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com
text:
F.:
     Here is a patch for the new version of sbcl that
was released a short time ago.  The developers had
originally intended to make this a stable 1.1 release,
rather than one of the versions that is updated every
month, but they encountered some problems in the
Windows port, and decided instead to make it 1.0.16. 
There will be some differences in behavior on our
platforms, so it may resolve the problems in the
1.0.15 build (or cause new ones ;) ).

b.
